title: Alex's Compressed Blocks
body:
### Compressed Blocks. 

![Compressed Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mlaTntz3/images/88d69561290693234508dd7a589628f480b943f8.png)

**Take your storage and resource management to the next level with the Block Compressor mod! This mod allows you to compress blocks into denser versions, saving inventory and storage space while making transportation easier.**
